name: hf
description: /hf <flags> — 🤗 HuggingFace upload wrapper (pure-hexa). Thin wrapper around `hexa-lang stdlib/hf/upload.hexa` (invoked via `hexa run $HOME/.hx/install/hexa-lang/stdlib/hf/upload.hexa …` — stdlib hot-swap, no binary rebuild; `hf` is ALSO registered as a first-class `hexa hf` verb in self/main.hexa for the next toolchain build). anima tool/hf_upload_mk2.hexa v2.2.0 (1014줄 순수-hexa HuggingFace 업로드 래퍼)를 hexa-lang stdlib 로 흡수한 1급 verb — checkpoint 디렉터리를 HuggingFace model repo 에 업로드한다. 파이프라인: README 검증(5 required H2 — Origin · Falsifiers · Substrate · Caveats · Composability · Caveats 섹션 ≥3 honest bullets) + repo naming 검증(<org>/<family>-<version>-<stage>[-<mod>] · family=clm|alm|blm|vlm|slm|tlm|nlm|mlm|llm|hexad|composite · stage=sft-stage|dpo|merged|base|preview|dev|paradigm- · §3.7 mk\d+-v\d+ grace until 2026-06-02) → `/usr/bin/find` 파일 walk + stdlib sha256 builtin → `hf` CLI (huggingface_hub v1.8.0+) repo create(--repo-type model --exist-ok) / upload(single commit) / repo tag create → audit jsonl + ledger ($HOME/.hexa/hf_upload_audit/, HF_UPLOAD_AUDIT_DIR/HF_UPLOAD_LEDGER env override). 토큰은 file-backed HF_HOME/token (umask 077 · chmod 600) 으로 ps-invisible — 토큰 VALUE 가 argv·`sh -c` 명령문·`ps` 어디에도 안 뜬다 (`--token <value>` 및 inline `HF_TOKEN=<value>` 둘 다 ps-visible 이라 회피). 3-tier 토큰 해석: (1) `secret get huggingface.token` SSOT (2) ~/.cache/huggingface/token (3) HF_TOKEN env. 성공 게이트 = 실제 commit URL(https://huggingface.co/ 시작 + Traceback/Error/401/Unauthorized 무) — `echo $?` 불신(fresh shell). raw#9 strict — Mac side .py 0, 네트워크 leg 만 `hf` CLI shell-out. WHY hexa-native 무수정: 전부 .hexa — agent .py/.sh 수작성 없음. Flags — --selftest (no network · validators + hf CLI + sha256 + walk 자가검사) · --dry-run --repo --ckpt --readme [--tag] (walk+sha256, no network) · --upload [--private] (실제 업로드) · --validate-readme <path> · --validate-naming <org/name>. anima 원본 무수정(활성 20-ckpt 백업 캠페인) · as-is 이식 + $HOME 기반 일반화. Triggers — '/hf', 'HF 업로드', 'huggingface 업로드', 'checkpoint 업로드', 'ckpt HF에 올려', 'hf upload', 'model repo push', 'HF에 모델 올려'.
